footer.tagline: Leading manufacturer of water and energy metering solutions with 30 years of expertise.

hero.title: Precision in Measurement
hero.subtitle: Leading manufacturer of water and energy metering solutions trusted in over 90 countries worldwide.

products.title: Our Product Range
products.subtitle: Comprehensive metering solutions designed for accuracy, reliability, and seamless integration.
products.waterDesc: High-precision water meters for residential and commercial use, from SMART meters to bulk flow solutions.
products.thermalDesc: Reliable thermal energy meters — mechanical and ultrasonic — for heating and cooling applications.
products.remoteDesc: LoRaWAN, M-Bus, and wireless remote reading systems for efficient, real-time data collection.

news.title: Latest News
news.subtitle: Stay up to date with product launches, events, and company updates.
news.item1Title: B METERS Launches New SMART Water Meter Range
news.item1Summary: Our next-generation SMART meters combine ultrasonic precision with integrated IoT connectivity for smarter water management.
news.item2Summary: Visit us at Hall 1, Stand B42 to discover our full range of metering solutions and live product demonstrations.
news.item3Title: LoRaWAN Integration Update for Remote Reading Systems
news.item3Summary: The latest firmware update brings enhanced LoRaWAN Class C support, reducing data latency for large-scale deployments.
news.item4Summary: Our annual sustainability report highlights our commitment to reducing environmental impact across manufacturing and logistics.
